summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-AUTH-006, VAL-UI-001, VAL-UI-002). All Flet UI components verified working: PasswordLockScreen and PasswordLockService exist and import correctly; OpenMarcusApp class exists with all 8 routes defined; no ft.icons (lowercase) found in codebase - all icons correctly use ft.Icons (capital I); all screens import successfully. Flet desktop apps render as Flutter native apps and cannot be tested with headless browsers - testing performed via code inspection and Python import verification.
